seoTitle: Mount Knowles vs Mount Lambie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Knowles and Mount Lambie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Knowles vs Mount Lambie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Knowles and Mount Lambie.
heading: Mount Knowles vs Mount Lambie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Knowles, New South Wales and Mount Lambie, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Knowles has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Mount Lambie (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Knowles or Mount Lambie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Knowles has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Mount Lambie scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Knowles scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Lambie scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Knowles or Mount Lambie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Knowles has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
